g.text: 1. Producer store to L1 | 1-4 cycles | 0.5-1 ns
5. Cache line transfer (same socket) | 40-80 cycles | 12-25 ns

div.p: Key Insight: False sharing occurs when producer and consumer access different variables on the same cache line. Each write by producer invalidates consumer's cache, forcing the entire 64-byte line to bounce between cores. Fix: alignas(64) separates head and tail to different lines.

text.tspan: // If M: writeback to memory, send data
// If S: just invalidate, data from L3
// If M: writeback to memory, send data
// If S: just invalidate, data from L3
// Producer's L1 has line in M state
// Producer's L1 has line in M state
